extraction.one_line_summary: HERRADA Jesús attacked solo with 1.5km remaining on Alto de Javalambre, dropped TEUNS and won by 7 seconds while POGAČAR attacked the GC group in final kilometer
tactical_patterns: GRMAY launched first attack on official climb start, forcing early energy expenditure that eliminated weaker breakaway riders later
POGAČAR attacked GC group final 100m despite no time gains possible, probing rivals' responses for future stages
TEUNS sat at back during breakaway attack flurry, then countered when others fatigued—tactical patience nearly worked
Breakaway gained 3+ minutes after peloton neutralized following mass abandonment crash, teams reassessing rider injuries before chasing

rider_signals.HERRADA Jesús: positive: attacked early with 500m remaining and sustained power to win by 7 seconds over chasing TEUNS
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: attacked reduced GC group in final kilometer showing aggressive intent despite no time gains available
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: positive: became race leader and second on stage using tactical patience, sitting back during attacks to counter later
rider_signals.GRMAY Tsgabu: neutral: initiated decisive climb attacks but faded when others countered, lacked sustained power for final
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: positive: moved to 2nd overall at 38 seconds by infiltrating strong breakaway, Astana willing to relinquish red jersey workload
rider_signals.FORMOLO Davide: negative: crashed earlier in stage, mentioned in outstanding form but long-term prospects compromised by injuries
rider_signals.GODON Dorian: positive: finished 3rd on stage from breakaway, strong French showing in finale
rider_signals.URÁ Rigoberto: negative: abandoned after major crash at 30km into stage, lost top-10 GC position
rider_signals.ROCHE Nicolas: negative: abandoned after same crash having started 5th overall and worn leader's jersey previous day
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: negative: abandoned in mass crash with URÁ and ROCHE, eliminating multiple GC contenders early
rider_signals.DE LA PARTE Víctor: negative: abandoned in same crash incident affecting multiple top-10 riders
